      "fix": "Validate amount is a positive finite number: `if (typeof amount !== 'number' || !Number.isFinite(amount) || amount <= 0) return res.status(400)`. Then check `if (amount > order.totalAmount - order.refundedAmount) return res.status(400)` to prevent over-refund.",

      "title": "No idempotency protection — duplicate requests cause duplicate refunds",
